name: Peanut Butter S'mores
recipeIngredient: 2 packages chocolate covered peanut butter cups, 1.6 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one peanut butter cup on each of four crackers.
2. Spear the marshmallows on a long fork or clean stick.
3. Toast the marshmallows over campfire coals or grill on low heat.
4. Place one toasted marshmallow atop each peanut butter cup.
5. Top with crackers.
6. Press together and hold for a few seconds to melt chocolate.
